characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Deal 6 devil damage to that foe. Then deal 6 devil damage to yourself.

sharedRules.name: Berserk
sharedRules.description: After a berserk unit ACTs, it splashes (self) 1 damage, then discards a berserk token. This damage can’t be increased in any way. If this effect does not damage any other characters, it deals 1 piercing damage to itself instead. Berserk counts as a positive and a negative token.

sharedRules.name: Retaliation
sharedRules.description: After any ability resolves that damages this unit, this unit deals 1 damage back to the ability’s owner, even if this unit was slain.
